title: pelargonium × dilatatum
intro: Pelargonium × dilatatum, also known as the Sweet Pelargonium or Rose Pelargonium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its fragrant, rose-like flowers and aromatic leaves. The plant is widely recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dilatatum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of tea or essential oil, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
